sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40142" key="e)pimei/zwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμείζων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, strengthd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μείζων</foreign>, <sense id="n40142.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">still larger</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">greater</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:211" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">211</biblScope> </bibl> (sed leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔτι μείζ-</foreign> vel <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέζ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
